behaviors.purpose: Produce a complete Java and Spring backend design artifact for senior review without implementing code.

inputs.name: REQUEST
inputs.description: Problem, goals, and constraints to design for.

inputs.name: PLAN_OUTPUT_PATH
inputs.description: Repository-relative destination for the plan artifact.

invariants: Do not modify implementation code.
Choose one design and explain rejected alternatives.
Keep chat output to the artifact path and three to five executive bullets.
stopConditions: REQUEST is unresolved.
PLAN_OUTPUT_PATH is unresolved or outside the approved artifact root.
Repository policy forbids the artifact write.

workflowSteps.action: Resolve the request and validate the output path.
Extract assumptions, constraints, and acceptance concerns.
Select one design and record rejection rationale for alternatives.
Write the complete twelve-section design document.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Stop and request direction before changing the requested scope, destination, or design-only boundary.

validation: Confirm the artifact exists at PLAN_OUTPUT_PATH.
Confirm all twelve required sections are present.
Confirm no implementation files changed.

behaviors.purpose: Run an external Codex review, fix high-confidence findings, run project checks, and verify closure.

inputs.name: REVIEW_SCOPE
inputs.description: Git diff or repository scope to review and repair.

inputs.name: INCLUDE_UNTRACKED_CONTENT
inputs.description: Explicit opt-in for untracked file content in full mode.

decisionTable.action: Include untracked content in review and verification.

when.condition: Otherwise.

decisionTable.action: Review the current branch against BASE or the detected default base.

invariants: Only fix high-confidence, high-priority findings within REVIEW_SCOPE.
Do not treat external review output as verified fact until locally checked.
Do not publish, deploy, clean Git state, or rewrite history.
stopConditions: The directory is not a Git repository.
Required Node, Bash, Codex, network, or authentication capability is unavailable or denied.
A fix requires unrelated refactoring or destructive Git action.
User changes overlap and cannot be preserved safely.

workflowSteps.action: Run the review script and retain review.md plus runtime evidence.
Select high-confidence must-fix and high-value should-fix findings.
Apply scoped fixes and add tests for behavioral gaps.
Run project checks and retain their report.
Run directed verification against the review and checks evidence.
Report resolved, unresolved, uncertain, and newly discovered high-risk findings.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Request approval before broadening REVIEW_SCOPE or making a material design change not required by an accepted finding.

fields.name: fix summary
fields.description: Applied and declined findings with rationale.

validation: Confirm review.md and verify.md were produced by actual script executions.
Confirm checks are reported as passed, failed, or skipped without inference.
Confirm every applied change maps to an accepted finding or required test.

behaviors.purpose: Produce an external Codex review artifact without modifying project code.

inputs.name: REVIEW_SCOPE
inputs.description: Git diff or repository scope to review.

decisionTable.action: Review the explicitly permitted full working-tree scope.

when.condition: Otherwise.

decisionTable.action: Review the branch diff against BASE or the detected default base.

invariants: Do not modify project code.
Writing review artifacts under .codex is the only allowed write.
Distinguish reviewer inference from verified facts.
stopConditions: The directory is not a Git repository.
Required external-review capability is unavailable or denied.
REVIEW_SCOPE cannot be resolved safely.

workflowSteps.action: Resolve repository, base, and review mode.
Run the bundled review script.
Retain review.md and runtime-environment.txt.
Report artifact path, scope, and concise findings summary.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Do not enter a fix or implementation phase.

fields.name: runtime evidence
fields.description: Tool paths, versions, and execution directory.

validation: Confirm project files are unchanged except permitted .codex artifacts.
Confirm runtime evidence identifies actual tool versions.
Confirm the reviewed scope matches the request.

behaviors.purpose: Verify known findings from an existing Codex review without doing new implementation.

decisionTable.action: Use it as supporting evidence while independently verifying review items.
Mark local-check conclusions unavailable instead of inferring them.

invariants: Do not modify project code.
Focus on findings in REVIEW_FILE.
Report new high-risk issues only when confidence is high.
stopConditions: REVIEW_FILE is missing, unreadable, or outside approved scope.
Required external verification capability is unavailable or denied.
Verification would require implementation changes.

workflowSteps.action: Validate and read REVIEW_FILE plus optional checks evidence.
Run the bundled verify script against current changes.
Retain verify.md and runtime evidence.
Report resolved, unresolved, uncertain, and new high-risk findings.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Do not reopen the task as an unbounded review or implementation run.

validation: Confirm verification references REVIEW_FILE.
Confirm no project code changed.
Confirm unavailable checks are explicitly marked unavailable.

behaviors.purpose: Align understanding and identify unknowns or risks without proposing solutions.

inputs.name: INPUT
inputs.description: Requirement, diff, logs, or design text to explore.

invariants: Do not propose solutions, implementation plans, or code.
Separate facts, inferences, and assumptions.
Produce chat output only.
stopConditions: INPUT is unresolved.
PERSPECTIVE is not an exact allowed value.
The request requires writes or implementation rather than exploration.

workflowSteps.action: Resolve INPUT and PERSPECTIVE.
Select the exact perspective route from the decision table.
Analyze only the supplied or approved evidence.
Emit the route-specific fixed output fields.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Do not turn exploration into planning, recommendations, or implementation.

fields.name: potential risks or risk signals
fields.description: Risks caused by current evidence or gaps.

validation: Confirm every assertion is a fact, labeled inference, or explicit assumption.
Confirm the output contains no solution or implementation advice.
Confirm the selected route matches PERSPECTIVE.

behaviors.purpose: Produce concise factual observations, uncertainties, and risks from knowledge gaps.

inputs.name: INPUT
inputs.description: Requirement, code, logs, or other evidence.

decisionTable.action: Analyze it with the observer perspective.

invariants: Do not suggest solutions or design decisions.
Do not fabricate missing facts.
stopConditions: INPUT is unresolved.
The requested output requires a decision, recommendation, or write.

workflowSteps.action: Extract verifiable facts and label direct inferences.
Identify missing or ambiguous information.
List risks arising from knowledge gaps without mitigation advice.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Remain observational; do not cross into solutioning.

validation: Confirm the three fields appear in order.
Confirm no recommendation language or fabricated fact appears.

behaviors.purpose: Surface clarity gaps and risk signals using a reviewer perspective without proposing solutions.

decisionTable.action: Analyze it with the reviewer perspective.

invariants: Do not redesign or recommend fixes.
Stay inside the supplied input scope.
Separate facts from interpretation.
stopConditions: INPUT is unresolved.
The request asks for implementation or redesign.

workflowSteps.action: Separate confirmed facts from interpretations.
Ask correctness, scope, and assumption questions.
Emit risk signals without mitigation or next steps.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Do not cross from review questions into solution proposals.

validation: Confirm all three fields appear in order.
Confirm no solution, fix, or technology recommendation appears.

behaviors.purpose: Provide a short factual closure summary without making new changes or decisions.

inputs.name: WORK_SUMMARY
inputs.description: Completed work context; current task context may satisfy this input explicitly.

when.condition: Known limitations exist.
No limitations are known from evidence.

decisionTable.action: Use the exact statement No known limitations.

invariants: Do not modify code or configuration.
Do not introduce new decisions or work claims.
stopConditions: WORK_SUMMARY cannot be resolved from explicit input or current task evidence.
Completion claims cannot be supported by evidence.

workflowSteps.action: Freeze the completed work scope.
Summarize factual changes and motivation.
List known limitations or the exact no-known-limitations statement.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Do not add follow-up implementation, release, or new scope.

fields.name: Limitations
fields.description: Known limits or exact absence statement.

validation: Confirm claims match actual completed evidence.
Confirm no new work or decision is introduced.

behaviors.purpose: Package completed work into review-ready handoff text without changing the completed state.

inputs.name: WORK_SUMMARY
inputs.description: Completed changes and validation context; current task context may satisfy it explicitly.

when.condition: The workspace is a Git repository.

decisionTable.action: Produce a conventional commit message and PR description.

when.condition: The workspace is not a Git repository.

decisionTable.action: Produce a local change summary and manual handoff steps.

invariants: Read-only packaging only.
Mark follow-up items out of scope.
Do not claim skipped validation passed.
stopConditions: WORK_SUMMARY cannot be resolved.
Workspace evidence is insufficient to distinguish completed, skipped, and blocked validation.
A requested action would publish or mutate the workspace.

workflowSteps.action: Freeze the current completed state.
Detect Git availability using permitted read-only inspection.
Generate the mode-specific handoff artifact.
Verify all mandatory fields and validation truthfulness.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Do not edit files, commit, push, publish, or add implementation during finalization.

fields.name: validation
fields.description: Actual passed, failed, skipped, and blocked checks.

fields.name: handoff
fields.description: PR description or manual delivery steps.

validation: Confirm workspace mode was actually detected or clearly unavailable.
Confirm every completion and validation claim has evidence.
Confirm no mutation occurred.

behaviors.purpose: Deliver a small bounded implementation with focused validation and no unrelated refactoring.

inputs.name: REQUEST
inputs.description: Target implementation request and acceptance criteria.

when.condition: The request is small, bounded, and has a safe execution basis.
The request expands into material design work.

decisionTable.action: Stop and request a plan or explicit direction.

invariants: Preserve unrelated user changes.
Avoid unrelated refactors.
Validate in proportion to changed behavior.
Do not publish or rewrite Git history.
stopConditions: REQUEST or acceptance criteria are unresolved.
Required permission or capability is denied.
Changes overlap user work and cannot be preserved safely.
The task is no longer small or bounded.

workflowSteps.action: Resolve goal, acceptance, and constraints.
Inspect only the context required for the change.
Apply the minimum necessary edits.
Run focused validation for changed behavior.
Report changes and any approved adjustments.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Stop before a non-trivial scope, architecture, dependency, or data-model deviation.

validation: Run the narrowest meaningful automated tests or checks.
Inspect the final diff for unrelated changes.
Report any skipped validation and residual risk.

behaviors.purpose: Execute an explicitly approved plan step by step with traceability and minimal deviation.

decisionTable.action: Execute the approved plan in order.

invariants: Treat the approved plan as execution scope.
Preserve unrelated user changes.
Run plan-required verification.
Do not publish or rewrite Git history.
stopConditions: PLAN_INPUT_PATH is missing or unreadable.
PLAN_APPROVED is not exactly true.
A non-trivial deviation is required.
Permission, dependency, or overlapping-change blockers prevent safe execution.

workflowSteps.action: Validate both required inputs and exact approval.
Read the plan as source of truth.
Implement plan steps in order within scope.
Run every plan-required verification and proportionate regression checks.
Map completed changes and deviations back to plan steps.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Stop on any non-trivial deviation and request a plan update or explicit approval.

fields.name: implemented changes
fields.description: Workspace edits aligned to the plan.

validation: Confirm every change maps to a plan step.
Run plan-specified checks and report exact results.
Inspect the final diff for scope drift.

behaviors.purpose: Execute confirmed implementation steps reliably with controlled scope and validation.

inputs.name: REQUEST
inputs.description: Confirmed execution basis and acceptance criteria.

when.condition: REQUEST contains confirmed executable steps and acceptance criteria.
Execution basis is ambiguous or material redesign is required.

decisionTable.action: Stop and request clarification or a plan.

invariants: Do not expand scope or redesign without approval.
Preserve unrelated user changes.
Validate changed behavior.
Do not publish or rewrite Git history.
stopConditions: REQUEST lacks a confirmed execution basis.
A blocking issue prevents a step from being completed safely.
Required permission or capability is denied.
Overlapping user changes cannot be preserved.

workflowSteps.action: Confirm steps, acceptance, and constraints.
Execute confirmed steps in order.
Stop and report blockers without silently skipping required behavior.
Run proportionate tests and checks.
Summarize outcomes and deviations.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Request approval before scope, architecture, dependency, or data-model deviation.

validation: Run tests or checks for every changed behavior.
Inspect the final diff against REQUEST and CONSTRAINTS.
Report skipped checks and residual risk.

behaviors.purpose: Create a short execution plan with explicit scope, trade-offs, and risks without writing code.

when.condition: REQUEST and success criteria are sufficiently clear.
Critical information is missing.

decisionTable.action: Mark assumptions and blocking questions instead of inventing detail.

invariants: Do not write production code or artifacts.
Make assumptions explicit.
Keep the plan lightweight rather than implementation-detailed.
stopConditions: REQUEST is unresolved.
Planning would require unauthorized external research or writes.

workflowSteps.action: Clarify target and success criteria.
State goals and non-goals.
Choose a high-level approach and trade-offs.
List execution outline and key risks.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Label assumptions and unresolved choices; do not silently turn them into decisions.

validation: Confirm every output field appears in order.
Confirm the response contains no production code or file modification claim.

behaviors.purpose: Assess plan decision clarity, assumptions, and execution risk without rewriting the plan.

inputs.name: PLAN_INPUT_PATH
inputs.description: Plan artifact path or explicitly supplied plan content.

decisionTable.action: Report the missing evidence and stop.

invariants: Do not rewrite the plan.
Do not propose alternative designs.
Separate observed gaps from assumptions.
stopConditions: Plan evidence cannot be resolved or read.
The request requires implementation or plan mutation.

workflowSteps.action: Resolve and read the plan evidence.
Verify explicit goals, scope, and decisions.
Identify assumptions, missing inputs, and technical or operational risk.
Produce review questions only.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Do not replace review findings with a rewritten or alternative plan.

fields.name: Decision clarity check
fields.description: Explicitness of goals, scope, and decisions.

validation: Confirm all four output fields appear in order.
Confirm no plan rewrite, implementation, or alternative design appears.

behaviors.purpose: Write a review-ready plan artifact from explicit intent and constraints without implementing code.

inputs.name: REQUEST
inputs.description: Goal and intent of the plan.

decisionTable.action: Use the Java backend design profile.

invariants: Design only; do not change implementation code.
Write only to PLAN_OUTPUT_PATH within the approved artifact root.
Return only the path and executive summary in chat.
stopConditions: REQUEST or PLAN_OUTPUT_PATH is unresolved.
PLAN_PROFILE is not an exact allowed value.
The destination is outside the approved artifact root.
Repository policy forbids the write.

workflowSteps.action: Resolve required fields, profile, and output path.
Read approved analysis and constraints.
Select the exact plan profile.
Produce a complete plan with explicit trade-offs and write it.
Return the artifact path and constrained executive summary.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Stop before changing scope, profile, destination, or the design-only boundary.

validation: Confirm the artifact exists and is complete for the selected profile.
Confirm no implementation files changed.
Confirm chat output does not duplicate the full plan.

behaviors.purpose: Route code or design review to the requested depth and emit evidence-grounded findings without implementation.

inputs.name: REVIEW_SCOPE
inputs.description: Code, design, tests, logs, or diff to review.

invariants: Do not modify code or provide implementation patches.
Review only supplied or approved evidence.
Clearly label facts, inferences, and assumptions.
stopConditions: REVIEW_SCOPE is unresolved.
LEVEL is not an exact allowed value.
The request requires implementation rather than review.

workflowSteps.action: Resolve review scope and exact level.
Select the matching review workflow.
Inspect required dimensions at the selected depth.
Emit findings with impact rationale and directional guidance only.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Do not expand the review scope, implement fixes, or decide release readiness.

validation: Confirm the selected route matches LEVEL.
Confirm findings are grounded in reviewed evidence.
Confirm no implementation patch or release decision appears.

behaviors.purpose: Deliver concise daily-review feedback with high signal and bounded depth.

inputs.name: REVIEW_SCOPE
inputs.description: Small diff, code, config, or tests to review.

when.condition: At least one obvious issue exists.
No obvious issue exists in scope.

invariants: Do not modify code or propose large refactors.
Stay inside REVIEW_SCOPE.
Prefer high-signal findings over completeness.
stopConditions: REVIEW_SCOPE is unresolved.
The scope is too broad or high-risk for lightweight review.
The request requires implementation.

workflowSteps.action: Scan correctness, obvious risks, and readability red flags.
Keep concise actionable high-signal findings.
Emit tagged findings or the exact clean statement.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Do not turn lightweight review into architecture audit or implementation.

fields.name: Findings
fields.description: Tagged bullets or exact clean statement.

validation: Confirm findings are obvious and scoped.
If no finding exists, use exactly No obvious issues found in this review scope.
Confirm no code edits or large refactor proposal appears.

behaviors.purpose: Perform standard evidence-grounded review and group findings by severity without implementation.

inputs.name: REVIEW_SCOPE
inputs.description: Code, design, tests, logs, or diff to review.

when.condition: A finding can cause data loss, security or financial harm, production instability, or incorrect core behavior.
A finding materially affects correctness, maintainability, scalability, or realistic bug risk.
A finding is low-risk but affects clarity, consistency, or best practice.

invariants: Do not write code or full implementation examples.
Review only REVIEW_SCOPE.
Distinguish facts from assumptions.
Do not approve, reject, or decide release readiness.
stopConditions: REVIEW_SCOPE is unresolved.
Evidence needed for a finding is unavailable.
The request requires implementation.

workflowSteps.action: Review correctness, complexity, performance, concurrency, errors, tests, and maintainability.
Separate observed facts from inference and assumptions.
Classify supported findings by severity.
Describe issue, impact, and directional improvement.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Do not expand scope, redesign the system, or implement fixes.

validation: Confirm every finding includes issue, impact, and directional improvement.
Confirm severity follows the decision table.
Confirm no implementation or release decision appears.

behaviors.purpose: Perform exhaustive production-critical review with explicit failure-cost reasoning and no implementation.

inputs.name: REVIEW_SCOPE
inputs.description: High-risk modules, stateful logic, or refactors to audit.

when.condition: A finding risks corruption, financial or security harm, production incidents, or incorrect core behavior.
A finding significantly raises maintenance cost or realistic bug, scalability, or testability risk.
A finding affects clarity, consistency, or low-risk best practice.

invariants: Do not write code or implementation-level fixes.
Make assumptions explicit.
Justify the risk or cost of every finding.
Do not approve or decide release readiness.
stopConditions: REVIEW_SCOPE is unresolved.
Required evidence for a high-confidence conclusion is unavailable.
The request requires implementation.

workflowSteps.action: Inspect correctness, edge cases, concurrency, performance, errors, observability, tests, boundaries, maintainability, and evolution risk.
Explain realistic failure impact and uncertainty.
Classify each supported finding by severity.
Provide issue, risk or cost, and conceptual guidance.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Do not redesign end-to-end, implement fixes, or broaden REVIEW_SCOPE.

validation: Confirm every finding includes evidence, impact, and conceptual direction.
Confirm severity follows the decision table.
Confirm assumptions are labeled and no implementation appears.

behaviors.purpose: Choose the shortest safe next workflow route before execution starts.

inputs.name: REQUEST
inputs.description: User intent and available execution basis.

when.condition: Intent explicitly requires the external Codex review, fix, and verify closure loop.

decisionTable.action: Route to the complete external closure workflow.

when.condition: Intent explicitly requires external Codex review only with no fixes.
Intent explicitly requires verification of an existing external review artifact.
Intent requires a deep or systematic analysis artifact without solutioning.
Intent requires reviewer-perspective exploration questions without solutions.
Intent requires factual understanding, unknowns, or risk without solutions.
Intent explicitly requires a Java or Spring twelve-section backend design.

decisionTable.action: Route to the specialized backend plan.

when.condition: Intent requires review of an existing plan without rewriting it.
Intent requires a lightweight plan with no artifact file.
Intent requires a formal review-ready plan artifact at an explicit path.
Intent requires a strict production-critical or security audit.
Intent requires a fast review of a small patch with only obvious findings.

After external, plan-review, strict, and lite review conditions are excluded, intent requires a read-only or findings-only review and prohibits implementation or modification; explicit severity grouping is not required.

decisionTable.action: Route to the standard findings-only review workflow.

when.condition: Intent requires a general review, does not specify a read-only, findings-only, no-change, lite, strict, external, or plan-review boundary, and no narrower review contract matches.
Intent requires execution of an explicitly approved plan file.
Intent requires a small bounded fix with focused validation.
Intent requires execution of explicit confirmed steps.
Intent requires a short factual closure summary only.
Intent requires a complete handoff or pull-request-ready closeout.

invariants: Recommend only existing canonical skills, compatibility command aliases, agents, and packs.
Prefer an exact specialized route over a broader hub when its condition matches.
Do not modify files or execute downstream work.
Do not claim validation has run.
Begin exactly with ## Recommended Route and emit no preamble or trailing commentary.

Always emit the complete ordered set of the selected workflows' canonical UPPER_SNAKE_CASE required input names, even when values are present, inferred, or resolved; never emit only unresolved inputs.
stopConditions: REQUEST is unresolved.
DEPTH is not an exact allowed value.
No safe route can be selected without a material user choice.

workflowSteps.action: Resolve request intent and execution basis.
Match the request to the decision table.
Select one next command or the shortest safe sequence.
Verify every named command, skill, agent, and pack exists.
Emit only the fixed route fields.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Do not invent surfaces, implementation steps, or validation claims.

fields.name: Canonical skill
fields.description: One of the six canonical 4.0 skills.

fields.name: Command alias (optional)
fields.description: Existing generated compatibility wrapper or None.

fields.name: Variant parameters
fields.description: Exact preset parameters for the selected internal workflow.

fields.name: Required inputs
fields.description: Exact canonical UPPER_SNAKE_CASE inputs required by selected workflows.

fields.name: Validation expectations
fields.description: Checks the downstream workflow must run.

validation: Confirm the most specific matching route was selected before considering a hub.
Confirm selected the canonical skill, compatibility alias, and preset exist in the generated catalog.
Confirm agents and packs exist in the product inventory.
Confirm required inputs exactly equal the complete canonical names and order of the selected workflows even when their values are present, inferred, or resolved.
Confirm the response contains routing only.

behaviors.purpose: Conduct systematic analysis and optionally export an identical evidence-grounded analysis artifact.

inputs.name: CONTEXT
inputs.description: Logs, files, modules, documents, or other evidence.

decisionTable.action: Perform surface-level analysis of obvious gaps.
Perform systematic analysis of edges, assumptions, and unknowns.

invariants: Analysis only; do not propose solutions, fixes, architecture, or code.
Label facts, inferences, and assumptions.
When exported, artifact content must be identical to chat content.
stopConditions: INTENT or CONTEXT is unresolved.
DEPTH is not an exact allowed value.
EXPORT_PATH is outside the approved artifact root.
The request requires solutioning or implementation.

workflowSteps.action: Resolve intent, context, constraints, depth, and optional export path.
Analyze evidence at the exact selected depth.
Label facts, inferences, assumptions, and missing information.
Produce the fixed three-section analysis.
If requested, write byte-equivalent analysis content to EXPORT_PATH.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Do not convert analysis into recommendations, design, planning, or implementation.

fields.name: Potential risks
fields.description: Risks from evidence, ambiguity, or system characteristics.

validation: Confirm all three chat fields appear in order.
Confirm no solution or recommendation language appears.
When EXPORT_PATH is used, confirm exported content is identical to chat content.
